_template_note: TEMPLATE — this is the worked example the tiger-skills harness ships. Replace the example features with your own. The grill skill (GATE 1) writes a spec and adds the feature; the planner persists its blueprint into tasks[]; the scribe is the single writer. Keep exactly one feature in_progress (WIP=1). ./init.sh validates this file (kanban fields, link reciprocity, acyclicity, task statuses).

status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

task_status_legend.in_progress: Subtask is being worked on right now.
task_status_legend.blocked: Subtask cannot continue until a documented blocker clears.
task_status_legend.passing: Subtask is implemented and its verification passed.

link_semantics.depends_on: This feature/task cannot start until the listed ids reach status 'passing'.
link_semantics.blocks: The listed ids cannot start until this feature/task reaches status 'passing'. Should be the reciprocal of depends_on.
link_semantics.tasks: Kanban sub-tickets. The planner writes them from its blueprint; the conductor flips their status as the generator/e2e-engineer/executor complete them. Each task is itself a small unit with its own status, owner agent, files, and dependencies.
link_semantics.acceptance_criteria: Checkable definition of done. Each item flips done=true only when its evidence is recorded.

features.title: First feature — replace with your own
features.user_visible_behavior: Describe what a user can observe when this feature works (the entry point they hit and the outcome they see). The grill skill fills this in from your approved spec. Exactly one feature is in_progress at a time (WIP=1).

acceptance_criteria.text: A checkable, user-observable criterion the verification proves
Another criterion with an asserting test (unit + an E2E flow for the user workflow)

tasks.title: Implement the feature + unit tests (planner's first blueprint task)
tasks.verification: lint + type-check clean; unit tests pass

tasks.title: Author the user-flow E2E (Playwright) for the real entry point
tasks.verification: playwright test drives the real entry point and asserts the visible outcome

tasks.title: Run the full verification pipeline and record evidence
tasks.verification: static + full unit suite + E2E all green from THIS session

verification: the full unit suite passes (no fail-fast)
an E2E test drives the real user workflow and passes
features.notes: Example feature. The harness flips status to 'passing' ONLY when every task is passing and every acceptance_criterion is done with recorded evidence.

features.title: Second feature — shows how tickets link
features.user_visible_behavior: Demonstrates depends_on/blocks: this feature cannot start until feature-001 reaches 'passing'.

acceptance_criteria.text: A checkable criterion proven by a test

features.notes: Not started — blocked until feature-001 is passing (depends_on). Reciprocity: feature-001 lists this in its 'blocks'.
